title: CBRE receipt object
description: A single receipt extracted (via vision) to supplement a bank line. Mirrors personal/runs/*/receipts.json; see RUNBOOK.md section 6 for how receipts are bundled and attached one image per claim line.

file.description: receipt filename (image or PDF) relative to the receipts dir

currency.description: ISO code in the receipt's original currency; AUD = domestic

total.description: receipt total in the original currency, or null if not legible

items.description: line items as printed on the receipt

pay.description: payment method / card noted on the receipt

note.description: free-text observation (e.g. duplicate, personal, needs re-read)

claimable.description: true if this receipt belongs on the CBRE claim (false = personal/duplicate)
